'''âp-g-ch''' ('''kapagach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:higgle|higgle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:higgle|higgle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-g-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kapagach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipagach|thipagach]] || [[word:jipagach|jipagach]] || [[word:shipagach|shipagach]] || [[word:kipagach|kipagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupagach|thuthupagach]] || [[word:jujupagach|jujupagach]] || [[word:shushupagach|shushupagach]] || [[word:kukupagach|kukupagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupagach|thupagach]] || [[word:jupagach|jupagach]] || [[word:shupagach|shupagach]] || [[word:kupagach|kupagach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupagach|thupagach]] || [[word:jupagach|jupagach]] || [[word:shupagach|shupagach]] || [[word:kupagach|kupagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepagach|thepagach]] || [[word:jepagach|jepagach]] || [[word:shepagach|shepagach]] || [[word:kepagach|kepagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopagach|thothopagach]] || [[word:jojopagach|jojopagach]] || [[word:shoshopagach|shoshopagach]] || [[word:kokopagach|kokopagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopagach|thopagach]] || [[word:jopagach|jopagach]] || [[word:shopagach|shopagach]] || [[word:kopagach|kopagach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopagach|thopagach]] || [[word:jopagach|jopagach]] || [[word:shopagach|shopagach]] || [[word:kopagach|kopagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpagach|thĂŠpagach]] || [[word:jĂŠpagach|jĂŠpagach]] || [[word:shĂŠpagach|shĂŠpagach]] || [[word:kĂŠpagach|kĂŠpagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapagach|thathapagach]] || [[word:jajapagach|jajapagach]] || [[word:shashapagach|shashapagach]] || [[word:kakapagach|kakapagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapagach|thapagach]] || [[word:japagach|japagach]] || [[word:shapagach|shapagach]] || [[word:kapagach|kapagach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapagach|thapagach]] || [[word:japagach|japagach]] || [[word:shapagach|shapagach]] || [[word:kapagach|kapagach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapagach|shapagach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapagach|goshapagach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapagach|gokishapagach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapagachnĂŒ|shapagachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapagachnknĂŒ|goshapagachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapagachnĂŒ|gokishapagachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapagachshĂ«|shapagachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapagachnkshĂ«|goshapagachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapagachshĂ«|gokishapagachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapagachro|shapagachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapagachnkro|goshapagachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapagachro|gokishapagachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapagachmu|shapagachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapagachnkmu|goshapagachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapagachmu|gokishapagachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapagachsher|shapagachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapagachnksher|goshapagachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapagachsher|gokishapagachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapagachng|shapagachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapagachnkng|goshapagachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapagachng|gokishapagachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapagachya|shapagachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapagachnkya|goshapagachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapagachya|gokishapagachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapagachyam|shapagachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapagachnkyam|goshapagachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapagachyam|gokishapagachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapagachnĂŒshĂ«|shapagachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapagachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapagachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapagachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapagachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapagachnĂŒro|shapagachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapagachnknĂŒro|goshapagachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapagachnĂŒro|gokishapagachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapagachnĂŒmu|shapagachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapagachnknĂŒmu|goshapagachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapagachnĂŒmu|gokishapagachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapagachshĂ«nĂŒ|shapagachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapagachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapagachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapagachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapagachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapagachshĂ«ro|shapagachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapagachnkshĂ«ro|goshapagachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapagachshĂ«ro|gokishapagachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapagachshĂ«mu|shapagachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapagachnkshĂ«mu|goshapagachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapagachshĂ«mu|gokishapagachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapagachronĂŒ|shapagachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapagachnkronĂŒ|goshapagachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapagachronĂŒ|gokishapagachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapagachroshĂ«|shapagachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapagachnkroshĂ«|goshapagachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapagachroshĂ«|gokishapagachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapagachromu|shapagachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapagachnkromu|goshapagachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapagachromu|gokishapagachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapagachmunĂŒ|shapagachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapagachnkmunĂŒ|goshapagachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapagachmunĂŒ|gokishapagachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapagachmushĂ«|shapagachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapagachnkmushĂ«|goshapagachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapagachmushĂ«|gokishapagachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapagachmuro|shapagachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapagachnkmuro|goshapagachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapagachmuro|gokishapagachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
